action_set_definitions.name: get_lease_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full internal state of a specific lease including current rent, status, and tenant sentiment.

lease_id.description: The unique identifier for the lease (e.g., LSE-MMG-772).

action_set_definitions.name: get_lender_compliance_requirements
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches the specific CMBS lender-mandated compliance and approval workflow steps for anchor lease modifications.

lease_id.description: The unique identifier for the lease.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_lease_offer
action_set_definitions.description: Sends a formal lease renewal proposal to the tenant with specific terms.

lease_id.description: The unique identifier for the lease.

term_years.description: Duration of the renewal in years.

special_provisions.description: List of special clauses (e.g., '90-day Landlord Recapture Right').

action_set_definitions.name: check_tenant_response
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the most recent communication or counter-offer from the tenant to check for specific demands like 'Go Dark'.

lease_id.description: The unique identifier for the lease.

example_output.last_message: We require a Go Dark provision for regional flexibility.

action_set_definitions.name: request_cmbs_lender_approval
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the negotiated lease terms to the CMBS lender for formal approval, a prerequisite for anchor leases.

lease_id.description: The unique identifier for the lease.

proposed_terms.description: Summary of the terms to be approved.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_lease_signing
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the renewal process by obtaining signatures and updating the renewal status to SIGNED.

lease_id.description: The unique identifier for the lease.

state_description.lease_id: Unique identifier for the lease agreement.
state_description.tenant_name: Full name of the primary tenant.
state_description.property_address: The physical address of the rental unit.
state_description.current_monthly_rent: The rent amount currently being paid under the existing lease.
state_description.lease_expiry_date: ISO 8601 date string of when the current lease ends.
state_description.renewal_status: The current phase of the renewal workflow (e.g., NOT_STARTED, OFFER_SENT, NEGOTIATING, SIGNED, TERMINATED).
state_description.tenant_sentiment: Hidden internal metric of tenant satisfaction (e.g., HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW) which influences their reaction to rent increases.
state_description.interaction_history: A log of all previous communications and actions related to this renewal.
